name: Live Now
description: Shows which Live TV channels are currently being watched on this server so you can tune into a warm channel instead of opening a new upstream slot.
overview: Surfaces warm Live TV channels (someone is already watching) so the household tunes into already-open upstream streams.

versions.changelog: Self-contained, one-install release: the warm-channel name badge (🔥xN) + favorite-float now run entirely IN-PROCESS as a background service inside Jellyfin (via IPluginServiceRegistrator) — no external daemon, no File Transformation plugin, no config required. Favorites float instantly via IUserDataManager (fires the change event, no restart). Safety: only ever removes favorites it added (never a user's own); reconcile-on-startup strips stale badges AND clears stale owned favorites; graceful revert on stop. Native dashboard config page (enable, favorite-float, poll interval). Removes the old web page/tab + bulk endpoint.

Initial release: GET /LiveNow/Channels warm-channel API + embedded mobile Live Now page with one-tap tune-to-play (server-side PlayNow on the caller's own session, with a channel-detail deep-link fallback).
